arts.sum: Mixed injury news in win over Fulham sums up Arsenal’s season The win against Fulham on Tuesday perfectly encapsulated Arsenal’s season. You had the positive of Bukayo Saka coming back, something that boosted the whole club. And then you had the crushing disappointment of seeing Gabriel Magalhaes limp off early with a hamstring injury.
